tickets.summary: Update recommended version of MariaDB to 10.11 or later
tickets.description:
[https://mariadb.org/about/#maintenance-policy MariaDB 10.6 will reach end of life on 6 Jul 2026].

To ensure WordPress is recommending a supported version of the software, the recommended version should be updated to 10.11 or greater, which is the next oldest still supported LTS version.

Previously:
- Bump to 10.1 & 10.2 (#41490)
- Bump to 10.3 (#55791)
- Bump to 10.4 (#58158)
- Bump to 10.5 (#61458)
- Bump to 10.6 (#63587)
